item.dc:creator: LeeeB

item.title: I'm finally made it out..... Just barely.
item.description:
That's it. I'm out. I'm finally out of the abusive marriage that almost killed me. I'm done with the drinking and the anger and walking on eggshells around her and not eating because "she bought those groceries for her." I have -$6.36 in my bank account but I have an empty basement with a couch for an apartment and, at 42, a new start. Enjoy some memes guys, I just might make it.
Here's the sad part.....Loki can't come with me. Not until I have a place of my own. She's the one who wanted a puppy, but she only likes having a dog when he's in another room
He'll be with me soon enough.
Me and the little guy call him the "big moose" so he made this for him. Sleep well, guys. I know I will tonight. Front page edit... Thank you, everyone. This isn't hyperbole, but I'm not sure I would've made it here without seeing how people care about each other. I saw that here. To all the guys who were laughed at or told to "man up" or whatever other bullshit people say: fuck them! I'm a 6' tall, 210 lb. heavily tattooed contractor from one of the worst neighborhoods in the country. I've fought on the jobsite, stared down a gun in my face on 2 occasions, and generally am not afraid of anything that doesn't have to do with my son. This shit can happen to anyone. I don't have any advice. Get out if you can. Keep your head up if you can't. I love you all. If you're in a position where you're able to, please donate to the Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh Free Care Fund. https://www.givetochildrens.org/our-purpose/featured-initiatives/free-care/
item.dc:creator: RoxJedi

item.title: Friday MEME DUMP (I have message for you)
item.description: Thanks for scrolling all the way trough! Hope this dump made you happy! Finally I would like to share with you a little passion project of mine. Me and my brother are making a game that is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and the narrator definitely has a touch a of GladOS to him. The game is part of Next Fest 2024 and it would the mean the world to us if you wishlisted: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Things that made me smile this week
item.dc:creator: kixxarse1986

item.title: A Funny Friday dump to end your work week (video heavy)
item.description:
Hey all, it's time for one of my Funny Friday dumps for a fun way to end the work week. If you can spare anything to help out an imgurian going through some tough times, feel free to do so at https://ko-fi.com/wanderingguy As always, bonus content that with more adult humor is linked to in the comments, so be sure to check that out. Enjoy the dump and I'll see you in the comments!
Definitely a better love story than Twilight.
All hail Attius, King of Corginia, uniter of the Cardigans and Pembrokes!
All the neighborhood dogs, but none of the neighbors.
This poor villager gets no sleep. Link keeps coming in every night to take his life's savings and then advance to the next day to do it again.
Never cross Grandma when it comes to food. After all, she is the one that cooks.
The Roads lead to all Romes?
Hope you're having a great Friday and it's the start of a good weekend.
item.dc:creator: PoliticalWanderer

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: This is Crowley.
item.description:
This is Crowley my 1 year old black Manx kitty posing at dusk. He has taken to farm life for sure! It’s been little over a month since I moved to a farm. He has loved every second of it!
He is the friendliest boy.
Beautiful sunset backdrop for the beautiful void.
I love the little nub of a tail he has!
Strolling down the driveway.
Crowley and Tessa, my great Bernese mountain dog who is a LDG or livestock guardian dog always on alert.
The look! The void is starting back.

item.title: I'm Allergic To Everything
item.description: Caroline Cray is “allergic to everything”. Diagnosed with MCAS, or mast cell activation syndrome, Cray’s diet is limited to two foods – oatmeal and hypoallergenic formula – to prevent her from going into anaphylactic shock. Cray is working to raise awareness for the syndrome, so that newly diagnosed people won’t have to go through the uncertainty that she did.
item.dc:creator: 60SecondDocs

item.title: Thanks for your continued support Imgur!
item.description: Any time I have shared my original music with people I know, they typically don't respond, or don't really care. I guess it is sort of a big ask, like "listen to this thing I poured my heart and soul into and then pretend it's cool" sort of thing. Sometimes it isn't people's taste, or they don't want to hurt your feelings, or they don't really care as much as you think they did, or as much as you care about it. It is nice to have an outlet on Imgur that I can put things out to. I don't make any money off it, I am not looking for fame or fortune, I just like sharing what I create with people, and Imgurians have been awesome in providing constructive feedback, following my work, and so on. So, to all of you, thanks for your continued support ! Here is the latest release: https://youtu.be/mRtVMD4Gyrg?si=y1hFuAYRZ-J-iB2k
item.dc:creator: FromTheBeyond

item.title: Pedos being pedos...but with offspring present? ʕ·͡ᴥ·ʔ﻿
item.description: “She was like, ‘I’m aware of the age difference.’ And then I was like, ‘Alright,’” he continued. “And her daughter was with her, and her daughter goes, ‘Mom, what the fuck?’ I swear to God.” Seriously feel bad for the daughter. Yikess. https://variety.com/2024/film/news/gaten-matarazzo-encounter-stranger-things-fan-1236018459/
